# CWE-289 — Authentication Bypass by Alternate Name (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-289-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

// Safe: matches canonical principal id including realm suffix.
func LookupPrincipal(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	who := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(r.URL.Query().Get("user")))
	var count int
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM principals WHERE canonical_name = ?", who).Scan(&count)
	if err != nil || count == 0 {
		http.Error(w, "unknown principal", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("X-Authenticated", "true")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
